debug_info.goal:
I : FKS.Inputs
x₀ σ₂ c : ℝ
N K : ℕ
hlog : log x₀ > 1000
hσ₂ : σ₂ ∈ Set.Ioo 0.9 1
hc : c ∈ Set.Icc 2 30
hN : N ≥ 1
hK : K ≥ 1
⊢ ∀ x ≥ x₀, Eψ x ≤ FKS.ε I x₀ σ₂ c N K

failed_attempts:
intro x hx
  -- Monotonicity: The bound ε(x) decreases as x increases.
  have h_mono : ε I x σ₂ c N K ≤ ε I x₀ σ₂ c N K := by sorry
  apply le_trans _ h_mono

  -- Define adaptive parameters for x
  let t₀ := max (Hσ I.H₀ I.R σ₂) (exp (sqrt (log x) / I.R))
  let T := t₀^c

  -- Verify conditions for Propositions
  have hx_large : x > exp 50 := by
    have : x₀ > exp 50 := by
      rw [← Real.log_lt_iff_lt_exp (by linarith [hlog] : 0 < x₀)]
      linarith
    linarith
  have hT_range : T ∈ Set.Ioo (3 * log x) (sqrt x / 3) := by sorry
  have hT_ge_H0 : T ≥ I.H₀ := by sorry
  have hT_gt_T0 : T > I.T₀ := by sorry
  have hT_gt_t0 : T > t₀ := by sorry
  have h_subset : Set.Icc 0.9 σ₂ ⊆ I.ZDB.σ_range := by sorry
  have h_decomp : Sigma T x 0 1 = Sigma T x 0 0.9 + Sigma T x 0.9 σ₂ + Sigma T x σ₂ 1 := by sorry

  -- Apply Proposition 3.4
  have h_bound : Eψ x ≤ ε₁ x T + Sigma T x 0 1 := by
    apply le_trans (proposition_3_4 hx_large hT_range)
    rw [add_le_add_iff_left]
    -- Proof that ∑ 1/|ρ| ≤ ∑ 1/Im(ρ) (implicit in Sigma definition)
    sorry
  
  rw [h_decomp] at h_bound

  -- Apply bounds for each Sigma term
  have h_b1 := proposition_3_6 I (by norm_num) hT_gt_T0 x
  have h_b2 := proposition_3_8 I x N T (by norm_num) hσ₂ h_subset hT_ge_H0
  have h_b3 := corollary_3_12 I K hσ₂ rfl hT_gt_t0 I.ZDB

  -- Combine all bounds
  rw [ε]
  linarith
